betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Mine Certus Quartz Ore found in the overworld. This crystal is the foundation of everything in Applied Energistics 2.

The ore drops Certus Quartz Crystals and occasionally Charged Certus Quartz Crystals when mined. Silk Touch yields the ore block itself.

Certus Quartz generates between Y-levels 32 and 64 in veins of up to 10 blocks. Look for the distinctive blue-white ore in stone.

Warning: Charged Certus Quartz Ore is much rarer than the uncharged variant. Do not rely on finding it in quantity from mining alone.
